The registered person, M/s Meridian Components Pvt Ltd (GSTIN 27XXXXX1234X1Z5), submits this explanation to the discrepancies communicated in FORM GST ASMT-10 for FY 2024-25, para-wise, with documentary evidence annexed. Para 1 — ITC of ₹3,20,000 stated to be availed in excess of GSTR-2B The credit pertains to invoices of FY 2023-24 which appeared in the GSTR-2B of FY 2023-24 but were availed in the GSTR-3Bs of FY 2024-25, within the time limit under section 16(4). The amount stands disclosed in Table 6A1 of GSTR-9 and Table 12B of GSTR-9C for FY 2024-25. Annexure A furnishes the invoice-wise mapping of each availment to its source GSTR-2B period. There is no excess availment; the comparison of a single year's 3B with the same year's 2B does not account for statutorily permitted cross-year availment. Para 2 — Reverse-charge liability of ₹36,000 on advocate services, Nov 2024 The liability is admitted and stands discharged. The omission was identified during preparation of the annual return and paid in cash — tax ₹36,000 and interest ₹6,320 under section 50 — vide DRC-03 ARN AD2712250098765 dated 10 Dec 2025, prior to filing GSTR-9/9C, and reported in Part V of GSTR-9C. Challan, ARN acknowledgement, and the 9C extract are at Annexure B. The payment being voluntary and prior to issuance of this notice, no further proceedings are warranted on this issue. Para 3 — Difference of ₹2,50,000 between GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B, Mar 2025 The difference arises from a credit note under section 34 against a March 2025 supply, issued and reported in the April 2025 GSTR-1. The adjustment is declared through the returns of the subsequent period and reflected in Table 11 of GSTR-9; Table 5E of GSTR-9C reconciles the audited turnover to the declared turnover with nil un-reconciled balance (Table 5R = 0). The rupee-wise walk is at Annexure C. No tax was short paid. Para 4 — Interest on delayed filing of GSTR-3B for Apr 2024 The delay of three days is admitted. Interest is computed under the proviso to section 50(1) read with Rule 88B on the portion of tax discharged through the electronic cash ledger (₹7,72,000 × 18% × 3/365 = ₹1,142) and has been deposited vide DRC-03 dated ___ Jul 2026 (worksheet at Annexure D). The registered person prays the computation on the cash portion be accepted in terms of the said proviso. In view of the above, it is respectfully submitted that the explanations be found acceptable under section 61(2) and the proceedings be dropped. The registered person remains available for any further information. Enclosures: Annexures A–D · Place: Mumbai · Date: ___ Jul 2026 · For Meridian Components Pvt Ltd, Authorised Signatory
